title: Make an Offer
subtitle: Start the negotiation by setting your asking price. Buyers can submit counter offers, and when you accept one, Mazal takes care of the payment, transfer, and payout process.
checkout_buyer_title: Complete your plate purchase safely through Mazal.
checkout_seller_title: Complete your plate sale safely through Mazal.
checkout_description: The plate and price are confirmed from the marketplace listing. Verify your details, choose payment, and Mazal will secure the transaction through escrow.
